summary: Tested both backend (9 pytest cases) and frontend (UI flows) for SRI SAI ANNAPOORNA GRAND restaurant marketing site. All backend endpoints and frontend critical flows working as expected.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py stores created_at as ISO string in DB but parses it back to datetime on list — works but inconsistent; consider storing as native datetime for indexable queries.

No POST /api/contact testid coverage exists in frontend (form not present in tested sections) — site spec mentions reservation + contact, but only reservation is wired; if contact form is intended on UI, add it. Backend endpoints are fine.

CORS allow_origins='*' with allow_credentials=True is technically invalid per spec; browsers will reject credentialed requests. Currently no auth/cookies used, so functionally fine, but tighten origins for production.
Reservation endpoint returns 200 instead of 201 on resource creation — minor REST nit.
test_credentials: N/A — no auth on this app
seed_data_creation: Test reservations & contact entries created with TEST_ prefix on names; not cleaned up (no DELETE endpoint exists).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend: 9 pytest tests in /app/backend/tests/test_api.py covering /api/, /api/reservations (create/list/validations), /api/contact (create/list/validation). Frontend: verified navbar, hero, menu bento (4 categories, click switches active panel), reviews carousel (next button advances review-card-N), reservation form (success state shows 'Request received!' toast 'Table requested!'), mobile nav drawer toggle. No DELETE endpoints exist for cleanup.
